description_long: This is a vibrant athletic running shoe featuring a predominantly purple mesh upper with pink accents and a gradient pattern along the sides. The shoe has a lace-up closure with matching purple laces and a padded tongue for comfort. The midsole is white and appears to be made of lightweight foam, providing cushioning and support. The outsole is slightly visible and has a pink section at the toe, suggesting a grippy, flexible design for traction. The side panels display a dynamic, woven pattern with a contrasting logo stripe in silver and pink. The overall construction suggests breathability, flexibility, and comfort, ideal for urban walking or running.
description: A purple and pink athletic running shoe with a mesh upper, lace-up closure, and a white cushioned sole, designed for comfort and urban activity.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, pink outsole tip, and purple laces with a padded tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the pink woven pattern, pink logo stripe, and the white midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel counter, pink mesh, and the white foam midsole wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Right side view features a silver logo stripe, purple mesh, and the white cushioned sole.
